scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @swiftpay/core && npm run build -w @swiftpay/policy
scripts.test:packages: npm run test -w @swiftpay/core && npm run test -w @swiftpay/policy
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w api
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w worker
scripts.migrate: npm run build:packages && npm run migrate -w api
scripts.build:all: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w api && npm run build -w worker && npm run build
